subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which hath been sent down in truth at a time when the Beloved was engulfed in grievous tribulation, and trials encompassed Him from all sides [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لکتاب نزل بالحق اذ کان المحبوب فی بلاء عظیم و احاطته البلایا من کل
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @firmness in the Covenant, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
